text: Small daily steps create extraordinary journeys.
author: Lumora

text: Discipline is choosing what you want most over what you want now.
author: Abraham Lincoln

text: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
author: Robert Collier

text: A little progress each day adds up to big results.
author: Satya Nani

text: Do not wait for opportunity. Create it.
author: George Bernard Shaw

text: The future depends on what you do today.
author: Mahatma Gandhi
